comparison_surface_note: Compares official Play clientbound projectile_power framed packet id and primitive body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Play, Direction::Clientbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Play clientbound projectile_power primitive framed dispatch/decode; not projectile entity runtime behavior or client-load completion.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Play clientbound projectile_power packet framing and dispatch/decode for one primitive entity id plus accelerationPower fixture only; it does not prove projectile entity existence, acceleration behavior, world state, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
